mapper.select: SELECT campus_name FROM dorm_buildings GROUP BY campus_name ORDER BY MIN(id) ASC
SELECT id, campus_name, building_no, building_name, created_at, updated_at FROM dorm_buildings WHERE campus_name = #{campusName} ORDER BY campus_name ASC, building_no ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, campus_name, building_no, building_name, created_at, updated_at FROM dorm_buildings ORDER BY campus_name ASC, building_no ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, campus_name, building_no, building_name, created_at, updated_at FROM dorm_buildings WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, campus_name, building_no, building_name, created_at, updated_at FROM dorm_buildings WHERE campus_name = #{campusName} AND building_no = #{buildingNo} LIMIT 1
